item.label: [PKT-FND-004](task-0035): Lifecycle CLI Stub
item.summary: Create lifecycle CLI stub and checkpoint writer

body:
# Description

Create lifecycle CLI stub and checkpoint writer.

# [PKT-FND-004](task-0025): Lifecycle CLI Stub

## Purpose

Create the lifecycle CLI stub and checkpoint writer.

## Scope

- CLI interface
- Checkpoint writing
- Lifecycle commands

## Implementation

1. Define CLI commands
2. Implement checkpoint writer
3. Add lifecycle commands

## Acceptance Criteria

1. CLI stub functional
2. Checkpoints written correctly
3. All commands work
